scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names server,client "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.dev:stop: bash -lc 'for port in 3001 5173 5174 5175; do fuser -k ${port}/tcp 2>/dev/null || true; done'
scripts.dev:reset: npm run dev:stop && npm run dev:infra
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=client && npm install --workspace=server
scripts.setup:local: npm run dev:infra && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push
